title: Unified Minimal Menus
notes: Drill Log and Shot Diagram now use the same simple menu structure.
Page directions stay hidden behind Add Page until they are needed.
Shot Diagram hole-data shifting stays hidden behind Shift Hole Data until it is needed.
Exports, backups, settings, updates, and destructive actions are grouped into clear expandable sections.
No hole data, storage, PDF, CSV, JSON backup, or compatibility formats were changed.
